summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hunter Guiris CC geolocation app. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend login page verified with all required UI elements present. Gemini AI is working, OpenAI returns quota error as expected.

minor.issue: OpenAI API returns 429 quota exceeded error
minor.note: Expected behavior per problem statement - OpenAI key has no credits

passed_tests: Backend /api/ root endpoint returns 200 with message
Backend /api/geocode POST accepts location, returns coordinates (Paris test)
Backend /api/history GET returns array of analysis history
Backend /api/analyze POST accepts image_base64, returns geolocation data with status=completed
Backend /api/maps-key GET returns Google Maps API key
Backend /api/history/search POST returns filtered results with statistics
Frontend redirects to /login when not authenticated
Login page displays logo with Target icon
Login page displays 'Hunter Guiris CC' title
Login page displays 'Multi-AI Geolocation System' subtitle
Login page displays 'Acceso Restringido' security warning
Login page displays 'Iniciar sesión con Google' button with Google icon
Login page displays footer note about authorized police use
Login button is enabled and clickable
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - existing history data used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs working correctly. Gemini AI provides geolocation analysis, OpenAI quota exceeded (expected). Login page protected with Google OAuth. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_hunter_api.py covers all major endpoints.

ai_api_status.openai_gpt4o: Error - quota exceeded (expected per problem statement)
ai_api_status.gemini: Working - returns valid geolocation with 100% confidence for known landmarks
ai_api_status.google_maps: Working - geocoding and reverse geocoding functional
